expectations.text: Output requires exact-shape equality and does not merge near duplicates.
expectations.evidence: Requires exact matching and reports no consolidation for near matches.

expectations.text: Output explains that directive/default-value mismatches are excluded from automatic consolidation by default.
expectations.evidence: Explains directive and default-value mismatches as exclusion reasons.

expectations.text: Output provides clear skipped reasons for non-exact groups.
expectations.evidence: Gives concrete reasons the near matches were skipped.
